turns_script.prompt: Hi, I need a 3-step plan to write a SIG benchmark report.
Actually make it 4 steps and emphasize reproducibility.
Now give a 2-sentence summary I can paste into the abstract.
Thanks. Finally, list 3 risks I should mitigate.

turns.user_query: Set family profile: 4 people, nut allergies, prefer Italian.
Switch to Asian cuisine. Find recipes.
Mother-in-law is vegetarian. What can we make?
